description_long: This object consists of two clear glass bottles filled with a golden-yellow liquid, each bearing a blue and white label with gold accents and text. One bottle is topped with a green lime wedge inserted into the neck, while the other is open with no garnish. Both bottles have a metallic crown cap, with one cap removed and placed on the ground nearby. The labels feature a prominent circular motif and bold, uppercase text, with additional smaller text and decorative elements. The glass surface is smooth and slightly glossy, and the bottles are slender with a long neck and rounded shoulders. The overall appearance is clean and typical of a commercial beer product.
description: Two clear glass beer bottles with blue and white labels, one with a lime wedge in the neck and a removed crown cap nearby.
description_view_0: Front view showing both bottles, one with a lime wedge in the neck and the other open, with a crown cap on the ground.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the lime wedge in one bottle and the back of the labels, with the cap visible on the ground.
description_view_2: Side view showing the lime wedge more prominently and the cap positioned behind the bottles.
description_view_3: Direct rear view with the lime wedge facing forward and the cap partially visible behind the bottles.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a blue and white color scheme with gold accents, bold uppercase text, and a circular motif. The design is clean and modern, with clear typography and minimalistic decorative elements.
